LamBox.Empty:
  mutual inductive(s):
    Empty
    type variables:  []
      constructors:

Scheme.Bad:
  type alias:
    type variables: []
    type: 𝕋

Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat:
  mutual inductive(s):
    Nat
    type variables:  []
      constructors:
        zero (0 arg(s))
        suc (1 arg(s))
          n : Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}

Agda.Builtin.List.List:
  mutual inductive(s):
    List
    type variables:  [a, A]
      constructors:
        Ֆ5bՖՖ5dՖ (0 arg(s))
        Ֆ_Ֆcons_ (2 arg(s))
          x : @1
          xs : Agda.Builtin.List.List{0} □ @1

Scheme.Σ:
  mutual inductive(s):
    Σ
    type variables:  [A, B]
      constructors:
        Ֆ_Ֆ2cՖ_ (2 arg(s))
          fst : @0
          snd : □

Scheme.ΣՖsubsyntax:
  type alias:
    type variables: [A, B]
    type: Scheme.Σ{0} @0 □

Scheme.Vec:
  type alias:
    type variables: [A, _]
    type: Scheme.ΣՖsubsyntax (Agda.Builtin.List.List{0} □ @0) □

Scheme.testVec:
  constant declaration:
    type variables: []
    type: Scheme.Vec (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}) 𝕋
    body: Scheme.Σ{0}{0}
            (Agda.Builtin.List.List{0}{1}
               (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                  (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                     (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                        (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                           (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                              (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                 (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                    (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                       (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                          (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                             (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                   (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                      (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                         (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                            (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                               (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                  (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                     (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                        (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                           (Agda.
                                                                            Builtin.
                                                                            Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                              (Agda.
                                                                               Builtin.
                                                                               Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                                 (Agda.

                                                                                  Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                                    (Agda.

                                                                                       (Agda.
                                                                                        Builtin.
                                                                                        Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                                          (Agda.
                                                                                           Builtin.
                                                                                           Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                                             (Agda.
                                                                                              Builtin.
                                                                                              Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                                                (Agda.
                                                                                                 Builtin.
                                                                                                 Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                                                   (Agda.
                                                                                                    Builtin.
                                                                                                    Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                                                      (Agda.
                                                                                                       Builtin.
                                                                                                       Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                                                         (Agda.
                                                                                                          Builtin.
                                                                                                          Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                                                            (Agda.
                                                                                                             Builtin.
                                                                                                             Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                                                               (Agda.
                                                                                                                Builtin.
                                                                                                                Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                                                                  (Agda.
                                                                                                                   Builtin.
                                                                                                                   Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                                                                     (Agda.
                                                                                                                      Builtin.
                                                                                                                      Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                                                                        (Agda.
                                                                                                                         Builtin.
                                                                                                                         Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                                                                           (Agda.
                                                                                                                            Builtin.
                                                                                                                            Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                                                                              (Agda.
                                                                                                                               Builtin.
                                                                                                                               Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                                                                                 (Agda.
                                                                                                                                  Builtin.
                                                                                                                                  Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                                                                                    (Agda.
                                                                                                                                     Builtin.
                                                                                                                                     Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                                                                                       (Agda.
                                                                                                                                        Builtin.
                                                                                                                                        Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                                                                                          (Agda.
                                                                                                                                           Builtin.
                                                                                                                                           Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                                                                                             Agda.
                                                                                                                                             Builtin.
                                                                                                                                             Nat.Nat{0}{0}))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))
               Agda.Builtin.List.List{0}{0})
            □

Scheme.head:
  constant declaration:
    type variables: [A]
    type: □ → (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}) → Scheme.Vec @0 𝕋 → @0
    body: λ _ _ _ →
            case<Scheme.Σ{0},0> @0 of
              λ<[_, _]>
                case<Agda.Builtin.List.List{0},0> @1 of
                  λ<[]> case<LamBox.Empty{0},0> □ of
                  λ<[_, _]> @1

Scheme.test:
  constant declaration:
    type variables: []
    type: Scheme.Bad 𝕋
    body: Scheme.head □ □ (Scheme.testVec)

Scheme.ListAliasՖ27Ֆ:
  type alias:
    type variables: [_]
    type: Agda.Builtin.List.List{0} □ @0

Scheme.ListAlias:
  type alias:
    type variables: [_]
    type: Agda.Builtin.List.List{0} □ @0

Scheme.Arrow:
  type alias:
    type variables: [A, B]
    type: @0 → @1

Scheme.Σ.snd:
  constant declaration:
    type variables: []
    type: □
    body: □

Scheme.Σ.fst:
  constant declaration:
    type variables: [A, B]
    type: Scheme.Σ{0} @0 □ → @0
    body: λ _ → case<Scheme.Σ{0},0> @0 of λ<[_, _]> @1

Scheme.Eq:
  constant declaration:
    type variables: []
    type: □
    body: □

Scheme.length:
  constant declaration:
    type variables: [A]
    type: □ → Agda.Builtin.List.List{0} □ @0 → Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}
    body: μrec [0] :=
            0: λ _ _ →
                 case<Agda.Builtin.List.List{0},0> @0 of
                   λ<[]> Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{0}
                   λ<[_, _]> Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1} (@4 □ @0)
